label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: ARENSMAN Thymen won from the 29-rider breakaway on Sierra Nevada while ROGLIČ Primož attacked the Evenepoel group inside 7km to go, gaining 15 seconds.
tactical_patterns: CRADDOCK Lawson abandoned talent-heavy 29-rider break early, signaling AG2R prioritized O'CONNOR's GC over break stage hunting.
ROGLIČ Primož conserved all domestiques before attacking under 7km, forcing EVENEPOEL Remco to chase alone after VAN WILDER Ilan dropped.
MAS Enric attacked before ROGLIČ moved, revealing UAE tested EVENEPOEL's isolation before Jumbo committed their leader.
VINE Jay bridged to CRADDOCK break despite wearing polka dots, prioritizing stage over conserving energy for mountains competition.

rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: Won queen stage from elite 29-rider break, confirms grand tour breakaway stage-hunting capability on hardest summit finishes.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Gained 15 seconds attacking inside 7km on queen stage, demonstrating superior legs when EVENEPOEL isolated.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Lost 15 seconds to ROGLIČ after VAN WILDER dropped early on final climb, revealing domestique weakness on hardest mountains.
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: negative: Dropped place overall on queen stage despite CARAPAZ dropping back to pace, signals vulnerability on multi-climb summit finishes.
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: Caught out by initial pace but retrieved time in secondary group with ALMEIDA, showing resilience after positioning error.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Attacked favorites group before ROGLIČ moved, finishing with LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel group ahead of EVENEPOEL.
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Finished with ROGLIČ on Sierra Nevada despite AG2R chasing for him earlier, confirms top-10 GC climbing form.
rider_signals.VINE Jay: neutral: Bridged to break for mountain points then finished in lead group, prioritizing polka competition over stage win.
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: Fell and abandoned support role on first categorized climb, leaving HINDLEY Jai alone in break.
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Finished in front group from 29-rider break without team support after KELDERMAN crashed early.
